title: Erie Indemnity: A Solid Foundation Amidst An Eerie Economic Volatility
text: Erie Indemnity Company remains successful at sustaining revenue growth and margin expansion. Its liquidity position stays in excellent shape as it reduces its borrowings to zero.

title: Erie Indemnity to host fourth quarter and year-end 2022 pre-recorded conference call and webcast
text: ERIE, Pa. , Jan. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Erie Indemnity Company (NASDAQ: ERIE) will host a pre-recorded audio webcast with the financial community providing financial results for the fourth quarter and year-end 2022 on Friday, February 24 th, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time.
